name: Po Yuen Cultural Holdings (Hong Kong) Co., Ltd.
summary: Po Yuen Cultural Holdings (Hong Kong) Co., Ltd. does not have significant operations. It intends to engage in business opportunities through a merger or acquisition with an unidentified company or an acquisition of assets. The company was formerly known as Asia Training Institute, Inc. and changed its name to Po Yuen Cultural Holdings (Hong Kong) Co., Ltd. in December 2017. Po Yuen Cultural Holdings (Hong Kong) Co., Ltd. was founded in 2014 and is based in Central, Hong Kong.
